name: tax4us Main Content Pipeline: Blog + Social Media Automation

parameters.text:
=**SPECIFIC TOPIC FOR THIS ARTICLE:**
{{ $json.topic || 'US-Israeli tax topics (choose a different topic than previous articles)' }}

**EXISTING POST TITLES TO AVOID DUPLICATING ({{ $json.existingPostsCount || 0 }} posts):**
{{ $json.existingPostTitles && $json.existingPostTitles.length > 0 ? $json.existingPostTitles.slice(0, 50).map((title, i) => `${i + 1}. ${title}`).join('\n') : 'No existing posts found' }}

**CRITICAL:** Your article title and content MUST be significantly different from ALL the above existing titles. Do NOT create content that overlaps with or duplicates these existing articles. Choose a unique angle, different focus, or different aspect of the topic.

**CURRENT YEAR:** {{ new Date().getFullYear() }}
**IMPORTANT:** When mentioning years in your content, use the current year {{ new Date().getFullYear() }}. All references to tax years, deadlines, and dates should reflect the current year {{ new Date().getFullYear() }}.

**USER NOTES/INSIGHTS (if provided):**
{{ $json.userNotes || 'No specific user notes provided' }}

**IMPORTANT:** If user feedback is provided, address it in this regeneration. Focus on the specific points mentioned in the feedback.

**USER FEEDBACK FROM PREVIOUS REJECTION (if provided):**
{{ $json.rejectionFeedback || 'No specific feedback provided' }}

**IMPORTANT:** If user feedback is provided, address it in this regeneration. Focus on the specific points mentioned in the feedback.

**IMPORTANT:** If user notes are provided, incorporate them into the content. Address any specific points, concerns, or angles mentioned by the user.

You must write a comprehensive article about this EXACT topic. Do not write about a different topic.

**YOUR TASK:**
Create high-quality, COMPREHENSIVE, SEO-OPTIMIZED Hebrew blog post content targeting a Rank Math SEO score of 100/100.

**OUTPUT FORMAT - CRITICAL:**
Return ONLY a valid JSON object with NO markdown formatting, NO code blocks, NO backticks.
The response must start with { and end with }.

{
  "title": "Hebrew title for the blog post (MUST include a number)",
  "content": "Full article content in plain Hebrew text (NO HTML, just text with natural paragraphs separated by double newlines)",
  "excerpt": "Brief 1-2 sentence summary in Hebrew for SEO (150-160 characters)",
  "focusKeyword": "Primary focus keyword (2-3 words, max 50 characters)",
  "seoTitle": "SEO-optimized title (50-60 characters, includes focus keyword at beginning AND a number)",
  "seoDescription": "SEO meta description (150-160 characters, includes focus keyword)"
}

**CRITICAL RANK MATH 100/100 REQUIREMENTS:**

1. **CONTENT LENGTH - MINIMUM 2500 WORDS:**
   - Target: 2500-3000 words for 100/100 score
   - This is NON-NEGOTIABLE for a perfect score
   - Count words carefully - short paragraphs mean MORE paragraphs needed

2. **PARAGRAPH LENGTH - MAXIMUM 120 WORDS:**
   - NO paragraph can exceed 120 words
   - Separate paragraphs with double newlines (\n\n)
   - Break long paragraphs into multiple shorter ones

3. **TITLE REQUIREMENTS (ALL 3 MUST BE MET):**
   - MUST include a number (e.g., "5 דרכים", "7 טיפים", "10 כללים")
   - MUST include power words (מהפכני, חיוני, מדהים, קריטי, מוכח, מקיף, מדריך)
   - MUST have sentiment (evoke curiosity, urgency, authority)

4. **Focus Keyword Optimization:**
   - Use focus keyword 10-15 times throughout (1-1.5% density)
   - Include in: title, first paragraph, at least one H2/H3, meta description
   - Natural placement - don't stuff keywords

5. **SEO Title & Meta:**
   - SEO Title: 50-60 characters, focus keyword at beginning, MUST include number
   - Meta Description: 150-160 characters, include focus keyword, compelling call-to-action

6. **Content Structure:**
   - Clear H2/H3 hierarchy (mark with ## and ### at start of line)
   - FAQ section with 5-7 questions
   - Numbered steps/lists where appropriate
   - Internal links: 3-5 links to tax4us.co.il articles
   - External links: 2-3 DoFollow links to authoritative sources (IRS, government sites)

7. **Images & Media:**
   - Reference 4+ image placements naturally in content
   - Use descriptive alt text suggestions

**TOPIC FOCUS:**
US-Israeli tax topics: FBAR, FATCA, Form 8938, tax treaty, investments, business tax, real estate, retirement accounts (401k, IRA, Keren Hishtalmut), tax law changes, state taxes, estate/gift tax, tax planning.

**YEAR REFERENCES:**
- Always use the current year {{ new Date().getFullYear() }} when mentioning current year
- Tax year references: "שנת המס [previous year]" (tax year [previous year]) for filing in {{ new Date().getFullYear() }}
- Deadlines: Use {{ new Date().getFullYear() }} dates (e.g., "15 באפריל {{ new Date().getFullYear() }}" for April 15 deadline)
- Always use {{ new Date().getFullYear() }}

**CRITICAL:**
- Output ONLY valid JSON - no markdown, no code blocks
- NO HTML in content field - plain text only
- NO [IMAGE PLACEMENT] or placeholder text
- Content MUST be 2500+ words (verify word count)
- Response must be parseable by JSON.parse()
- Use current year {{ new Date().getFullYear() }}

  "title": $json.title || '',
  "content": $json.content || '',

  "comment_status": $('Process Topic Approval').first().json.comment_status || $('Extract Template Info').first().json.comment_status || 'open',

  "tags": $json.tagIds || [],

    "rank_math_title": $json.seoTitle || $json.title || '',
    "rank_math_description": $json.seoDescription || $json.excerpt || ''
  }
} }}

={{ {
  title: $json.title || '',
  content: $json.content || '',
  excerpt: $json.excerpt || '',
  status: 'publish',

  lang: 'he',

    rank_math_focus_keyword: $json.focusKeyword || '',
    rank_math_title: $json.seoTitle || $json.title || '',
    rank_math_description: $json.seoDescription || $json.excerpt || ''
  }
} }}

assignments.name: slackMessage
assignments.value:
={{ '🎯 *New WordPress Post Draft Ready for Review*

' + '*Title:* ' + ($input.first().json.title?.rendered ?? $('Parse AI Response').first().json.title ?? 'Untitled') + '

' + '*Excerpt:* ' + ($input.first().json.excerpt?.rendered ?? $('Parse AI Response').first().json.excerpt ?? 'No excerpt') + '

' + '*Edit in WordPress:* ' + 'https://www.tax4us.co.il/wp-admin/post.php?post=' + ($input.first().json.id ?? 0) + '&action=edit' + '

' + '*AI Reasoning:* AI-generated content

' + '════════════════════════════════════════
' + '💡 *ADD YOUR NOTES OR INSIGHTS* (Optional)

' + 'You can add notes, feedback, or insights in the text field below before clicking Approve or Decline.
' + 'These notes will be used if the content needs to be regenerated.

' + '*Examples of helpful notes:*
' + '• "Focus more on X aspect"
' + '• "Add examples about Y"
' + '• "Clarify Z section"
' + '• "Change tone to be more professional/casual"

' + '════════════════════════════════════════

' + '_Automated workflow_' }}

parameters.text:
=You are a professional Hebrew-to-English translator specializing in US-Israeli tax content for Tax4US.

**CRITICAL: You MUST translate ALL Hebrew text to English. NO Hebrew characters should remain in your output.**

**HEBREW CONTENT TO TRANSLATE:**

**Title:** {{ $json.hebrewTitle || 'Untitled' }}

**Excerpt:** {{ $json.hebrewExcerpt || '' }}

**Content (Gutenberg blocks - translate ALL visible text, preserve ALL HTML/block structure):**
{{ $json.hebrewContent || '' }}

**Focus Keyword (Hebrew):** {{ $json.hebrewFocusKeyword || '' }}

**SEO Title (Hebrew):** {{ $json.hebrewSeoTitle || '' }}

**SEO Description (Hebrew):** {{ $json.hebrewSeoDescription || '' }}

---

**YOUR TASK:**
Translate ALL the above Hebrew content to fluent, professional American English. **EVERY SINGLE WORD of Hebrew text must be translated. NO Hebrew characters (א-ת) should appear in your output.**

**OUTPUT FORMAT - CRITICAL:**
Return ONLY a valid JSON object with NO markdown formatting, NO code blocks, NO backticks.
The response must start with { and end with }.

{
  "title": "Translated English title (compelling, SEO-friendly, include a number if original has one, NO Hebrew characters)",
  "excerpt": "Translated excerpt (150-160 characters for SEO, NO Hebrew characters)",
  "content": "Translated content - preserve all Gutenberg block HTML structure exactly, translate ALL visible text between tags to English, NO Hebrew characters anywhere",
  "focusKeyword": "Translated focus keyword in English (2-4 words, max 50 chars, NO Hebrew)",
  "seoTitle": "SEO-optimized English title (50-60 chars, keyword at beginning, NO Hebrew)",
  "seoDescription": "SEO meta description in English (150-160 chars, includes focus keyword, NO Hebrew)"
}

**CRITICAL REQUIREMENTS:**
1. **ZERO TOLERANCE FOR HEBREW**: Your output must contain ZERO Hebrew characters (א-ת). Every Hebrew word must be translated.
2. Preserve ALL HTML tags, Gutenberg comments (<!-- wp:xxx -->), and block structure EXACTLY
3. Translate ALL visible text content between HTML tags - NO Hebrew text should remain
4. Do NOT translate HTML attributes, class names, or WordPress comments - only translate visible text
5. Maintain professional tax/financial terminology (FBAR, Form 8938, IRS, etc.)
6. Keep numbers, percentages, form numbers, and technical terms exactly as-is
7. Output ONLY valid JSON - no markdown, no code blocks, no explanation
8. The content field must contain the FULL translated content with all Gutenberg blocks preserved
9. If the title contains a number (e.g., '7 דרכים'), keep the number in the English title (e.g., '7 Ways')
10. **VERIFY**: Before outputting, check that your JSON contains NO Hebrew characters anywhere

values.content:
You are an expert social media content creator for Tax4US, a US-Israeli tax advisory service.

## TAX4US BRAND GUIDELINES:
- **Brand Colors**: Primary Green #8fb634 (lime/olive), Secondary #a1cd3a (bright lime)
- **Brand Voice**: Professional, trustworthy, expert yet approachable
- **Target Audience**: US expats living in Israel, dual citizens, American investors in Israel
- **Tone**: Authoritative but friendly, educational, value-driven

⚠️ CRITICAL RULE: The featured image ALREADY shows the article title. Write DIFFERENT, CREATIVE text - NOT the title.

---

**ARTICLE INFO:**
- Title (IN THE IMAGE - DO NOT USE): {{ $json.english_post_title || $json.title?.raw || $json.title || '' }}
- URL (MUST INCLUDE): {{ $json.english_post_url || $json.link || 'https://tax4us.co.il' }}
- Excerpt: {{ $json.english_post_excerpt || $json.excerpt?.raw || '' }}
- Focus Keyword: {{ $json.focusKeyword || '' }}

---

**YOUR TASK:** Create a professional LinkedIn post (English only) that complements the image (which shows the title).

**LINKEDIN POST REQUIREMENTS (500-700 characters):**

1. **Professional Hook (First 1-2 Lines)**: Start with an insight, surprising fact, or professional question
   - Examples: "For US expats in Israel, navigating foreign tax credits requires careful attention..."
   - ❌ DO NOT start with the article title

2. **Key Insights**: Share 2-3 valuable takeaways from the article
   - Use → or • for bullet points
   - Provide real value, not just teasers

3. **Expert Perspective**: Add thought leadership angle
   - "What many don't realize..."
   - "In practice, this means..."

4. **Call-to-Action**: Professional CTA with the article URL
   - "Read the complete guide:" [URL]

5. **Hashtags**: Include 4-5 relevant hashtags at the end
   - #USTax #ExpatTax #TaxPlanning #USExpats #IsraelTax #FBAR #FATCA

**GOOD EXAMPLE:**
```
For US expats in Israel, proper foreign tax credit filing isn't just paperwork—it's potentially thousands in savings.

Key considerations:
→ Form 1116 timing matters more than most realize
→ The US-Israel tax treaty offers specific provisions many overlook
→ Documentation requirements changed in 2024

What many don't realize is that incorrect filing can trigger IRS scrutiny years later.

Get the complete breakdown: https://tax4us.co.il/article

#USTax #ExpatTax #TaxPlanning #USExpats #IsraelTax
```

**BAD EXAMPLE (DO NOT DO THIS):**
```
7 Critical Rules for Form 1116 https://tax4us.co.il/article
```

---

**OUTPUT:** Return ONLY valid JSON (no markdown, no backticks):

{"linkedin_post": "Your professional LinkedIn post with URL and hashtags", "linkedin_hashtags": ["#USTax", "#ExpatTax", "#TaxPlanning", "#USExpats", "#IsraelTax"], "key_insights": ["Insight 1", "Insight 2", "Insight 3"]}

**REMEMBER:**
1. The title is ALREADY in the image - write something DIFFERENT
2. MUST include the URL: {{ $json.english_post_url || $json.link || 'https://tax4us.co.il' }}
3. Professional tone that reflects Tax4US brand (trustworthy, expert, helpful)
4. Target audience: US expats in Israel
5. Include specific IRS forms, regulations, or deadlines from the article when available

assignments.name: message

values.content:
אתה מומחה לתוכן סושיאל עבור Tax4US, שירות ייעוץ מס ישראלי-אמריקאי.

## הנחיות מיתוג TAX4US:
- **צבעי מותג**: ירוק ראשי #8fb634, ירוק משני #a1cd3a
- **קול המותג**: מקצועי, אמין, מומחה אך נגיש
- **קהל יעד**: אמריקאים בישראל, בעלי אזרחות כפולה, משקיעים אמריקאים בישראל
- **טון**: סמכותי אך ידידותי, חינוכי, נותן ערך

⚠️ כלל קריטי: התמונה המצורפת כבר מציגה את כותרת המאמר. עליך לכתוב תוכן שונה ויצירתי - לא את הכותרת.

---

**מידע על המאמר בעברית:**
- כותרת עברית (בתמונה - אל תשתמש): {{ $json.title?.rendered || $json.title || '' }}
- קישור עברית: {{ $json.link || '' }}
- תקציר: {{ $json.excerpt?.rendered || '' }}

**מידע על המאמר באנגלית:**
- כותרת אנגלית: {{ $('Link Polylang Translations1').first().json.english_post_title || '' }}
- קישור אנגלית: {{ $('Link Polylang Translations1').first().json.english_post_url || '' }}

---

**המשימה שלך:** צור פוסט פייסבוק דו-לשוני שמשקף את מיתוג Tax4US.

**מבנה הפוסט:**

1. **כותרת עברית** - כותרת קצרה ומושכת שמתחילה בשאלה או עובדה מפתיעה
   - דוגמאות: "האם אתם משלמים מס כפול?", "הטעות הזו עולה...", "אל תפספסו..."
   - ❌ לא להתחיל בכותרת המאמר!

2. **כותרת אנגלית** - תרגום/גרסה מקבילה של הכותרת העברית

3. **טיזר בעברית** - 2-3 משפטים שנותנים ערך ומושכים ללחוץ

4. **קישורים** - חובה שני קישורים (עברית ואנגלית):
   - 🔗 לקריאה בעברית: [URL]
   - 🔗 Read in English: [URL]

5. **אימוג'ים** - 2-3 אימוג'ים רלוונטיים (💰 📊 🇺🇸🇮🇱 ⚠️ ✅)

**דוגמה טובה:**
```
💰 האם אתם משלמים מס כפול בטעות?
Are you accidentally paying double taxes?

רוב האמריקאים בישראל מפספסים את הכלל הקריטי הזה בטופס 1116 שיכול לחסוך אלפי דולרים. אל תשאירו כסף על השולחן!

🔗 לקריאה בעברית: https://tax4us.co.il/he/article
🔗 Read in English: https://tax4us.co.il/en/article
```

**דוגמה רעה (אל תעשה כך):**
```
7 כללים קריטיים למילוי טופס 1116
https://tax4us.co.il/article
```

---

**פלט:** החזר JSON בלבד (ללא markdown, ללא backticks):

{"hebrew_headline": "כותרת יצירתית בעברית שמתחילה בשאלה/עובדה", "english_headline": "Matching English headline", "hebrew_teaser": "טיזר מושך בעברית 2-3 משפטים", "hebrew_url": "הקישור למאמר בעברית", "english_url": "הקישור למאמר באנגלית", "full_post": "הפוסט המלא מוכן לפרסום עם כל האלמנטים"}

**זכור:**
1. הכותרת כבר בתמונה - כתוב משהו אחר (שאלה/עובדה מפתיעה)
2. חייב לכלול שני הקישורים (עברית ואנגלית)
3. הטיזר בעברית בלבד
4. שמירה על מיתוג Tax4US - מקצועי, אמין, מומחה
5. השתמש באימוג'ים בצורה מתונה (2-3)

assignments.name: slack_message
